avatar.container: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(72,187,120,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(72,187,120,0.2);

footer.container: position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; padding: 16px; color: #48BB78; font-size: 13px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(72,187,120,0.2); background: rgba(240,255,244,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
footer.text: color: inherit; transition: color 0.2s ease; white-space: nowrap;

emphasis.em: font-style: normal; color: #48BB78; background: rgba(72,187,120,0.1); padding: 0 4px; border-radius: 2px;

list.taskList: list-style: none; margin-left: -22px; font-size: 15px; color: #4A5568; line-height: 1.8;

code.block: background: #E6FFFA; padding: 1.2em; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; color: #276749; margin: 1.3em 0; border: 1px solid rgba(72,187,120,0.2);
code.inline: background: #E6FFFA; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; color: #276749; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace;

styles.quote: border-left: 3px solid #48BB78; padding: 0 0 0 18px; margin: 1.2em 0; color: #276749; font-style: normal; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; background: rgba(72,187,120,0.05); border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0;
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.3em auto; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(72,187,120,0.1);
styles.link: color: #38A169; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(56,161,105,0.3); transition: all 0.2s ease;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1.3em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(72,187,120,0.2);

styles.hr: border: none; border-top: 1px solid rgba(72,187,120,0.2); margin: 28px 0;
